name: HEICO CORP
business: HEICO is a manufacturer of FAA-approved jet engine and aircraft component replacement parts and a manufacturer of electronic equipment for aviation, defense, space, medical, telecommunications, and electronics industries. Its Flight Support Group designs and manufactures replacement parts, repairs and overhauls components, and distributes parts. The Electronic Technologies Group designs and manufactures various electronic, microwave, and electro-optical products for military, space, medical, and industrial applications.
sellsTo: commercial air carriers and aircraft repair companies

exposures.sentence: The FSG uses proprietary technology to design and manufacture jet engine and aircraft component replacement parts for sale at lower prices than those manufactured by OEMs.

The ETG derived approximately 51%, 51% and 49% of its net sales in fiscal 2025, 2024 and 2023, respectively, from the sale of products and services to U.S. and foreign military agencies, prime defense contractors and both commercial and defense satellite and spacecraft manufacturers.
Our microwave products are used in both commercial and military satellites, spacecraft and in electronic warfare systems.
The ETG designs and manufactures high and very high voltage interconnection devices, cable assemblies and wire for the medical equipment, defense and other industrial markets.

The ETG designs, manufactures and markets three-dimensional microelectronic and stacked memory products including memories, Point of Load (POL) voltage converters and peripherals, industrial memories, and complex System-in-Package (SiP) solutions.
The ETG designs and manufactures higher performance test sockets and adapters for both engineering and production use of semiconductor devices.
The ETG is a designer and maker of laser rangefinder receivers and other photodetectors used in airborne, vehicular and handheld targeting systems
Our microwave products are used in both commercial and military satellites, spacecraft and in electronic warfare systems.
The ETG designs and manufactures highly sensitive, reliable and easy-to-use nuclear radiation detectors for law enforcement, homeland security and military applications.
The ETG designs and manufactures TSCM equipment to detect devices used for espionage and information theft

The ETG designs and manufactures shielding used to prevent electromagnetic energy and radio frequencies from interfering with other devices, such as computers, telecommunication devices, avionics, weapons systems and other electronic equipment.

Hi-Rel, complex, passive electronic components and rotary joint assemblies for mostly aerospace and defense applications, in addition to other high-end applications, such as medical and energy uses, including emerging 'clean energy' and electrification applications.
Reductions in defense, space or homeland security spending by U.S. and/or foreign customers could reduce our revenues.
Reductions in defense, space or homeland security spending by U.S. and/or foreign customers could reduce our revenues.

catalysts.sentence: Capital expenditures in fiscal 2026 are anticipated to be approximately $80 to $90 million.
